name: Cherry Liqueur 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Pierce each cherry several times to ensure the inside comes into contact with the alcohol.
2. Place cherries in a jar and sprinkle powdered sugar over them.
3. Add brandy and vodka, covering all cherries. If needed, add more brandy until fully covered.
4. Seal the jar tightly and store at approximately 80 degrees Fahrenheit for six weeks.
5. Strain off the liquid, extracting additional liquid from the cherries.
6. Add mace and sugar syrup to the strained liquid.
7. Shake well and filter through cheesecloth to remove any remaining fruit particles.
